# Mixed text + file fields in a multipart struct

muxt generate --use-receiver-type=T
muxt check

exec go test -cover

-- template.gohtml --
{{define "POST /upload 201 Upload(multipart)" }}<p>{{.Result}}</p>{{end}}

-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22

-- template.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
	"mime/multipart"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type UploadForm struct {
	Title  string                `name:"title"`
	Count  int                   `name:"count"`
	Tags   []string              `name:"tag"`
	Avatar *multipart.FileHeader `name:"avatar"`
}

type T struct {
	spy func(UploadForm) string
}

func (t T) Upload(multipart UploadForm) string {
	return t.spy(multipart)
}

-- template_test.go --
package server

import (
	"bytes"
	"mime/multipart"
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"testing"
)

func Test(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()

	var service T
	service.spy = func(form UploadForm) string {
		if form.Title != "hello" {
			t.Errorf("Title = %q, want %q", form.Title, "hello")
		}
		if form.Count != 3 {
			t.Errorf("Count = %d, want 3", form.Count)
		}
		if len(form.Tags) != 2 || form.Tags[0] != "go" || form.Tags[1] != "web" {
			t.Errorf("Tags = %#v, want [go web]", form.Tags)
		}
		if form.Avatar == nil || form.Avatar.Filename != "x.txt" {
			t.Errorf("Avatar = %+v, want filename x.txt", form.Avatar)
		}
		return form.Title
	}

	TemplateRoutes(mux, service)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	w := multipart.NewWriter(body)
	if err := w.WriteField("title", "hello"); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	if err := w.WriteField("count", "3"); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	for _, tag := range []string{"go", "web"} {
		if err := w.WriteField("tag", tag); err != nil {
			t.Fatal(err)
		}
	}
	fw, err := w.CreateFormFile("avatar", "x.txt")
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	if _, err := fw.Write([]byte("xx")); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	if err := w.Close(); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/upload", body)
	req.Header.Set("content-type", w.FormDataContentType())
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()

	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
	if rec.Result().StatusCode != http.StatusCreated {
		t.Errorf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Result().StatusCode, http.StatusCreated)
	}
}
